ocr_snippet: DOCTOR’S CASE REPORT NAME: AGE/SEX: 6/M/Mah Child complain: c/o Fever x 7 days. c/o vomiting for 6 days. The Fever was insidious in onset, intermittent in nature, approximately on evening , relieved on reduction of activity. c/o vomiting for 6 days, 3-4 episodes per day which is non-bilious, non-blood stained, & contains food particles.
